19ebe919-ee0d-40e1-80d7-d47d37af851e.label: text_chunk
19ebe919-ee0d-40e1-80d7-d47d37af851e.text:
NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

THIS AGREEMENT is by and between the Stockbridge-Munsee Community d.b.a. Mohican North Star Gaming and Resort located at W12180 County Road A , Bowler, WI  54416 (“ Casino ”), and _______________________________________________ with offices located at ________________________________________________________ (“Receiving Party”).

1821e01c-7b16-4b2a-982f-e1c9dec55219.label: text_chunk
1821e01c-7b16-4b2a-982f-e1c9dec55219.text:
WHEREAS, Casino and Receiving Party have entered into discussions to _______________________________________________ (herein after referred to as the “Project”) and, in the course of these discussions, Receiving Party will have access to Confidential Information (as defined below) about the Casino ; and WHEREAS, the parties wish to protect such Confidential Information.NOW, THEREFORE, the parties agree as follows:
1.

1835121b-9d60-4193-80f3-7cd355d03b51.label: text_chunk
1835121b-9d60-4193-80f3-7cd355d03b51.text: “Confidential Information” means any and all confidential and/or proprietary information disclosed by the Casino to the Receiving Party, which may include without limitation:  financial information, business information, marketing data, trade secrets, and other data, materials, products, plans, specifications, reports, manuals, computer software or programs, contractual relationships and other similar information delivered in any form or media.2.

0d8cd7cd-6f71-4ab2-8a4b-6e149648ced4.label: text_chunk
0d8cd7cd-6f71-4ab2-8a4b-6e149648ced4.text:
Confidential Information is disclosed to Receiving Party solely for the purpose of providing services for the Project.

  Receiving Party agrees to hold such Confidential Information in strict confidence.  Receiving Party agrees not to use, divulge, reproduce or otherwise make available the Confidential Information other than for the purposes of the Project and to disclose it only to its officers, agents, employees, partners, and professional advisors as necessary, who shall also be bound to comply with this Agreement.3.

d5252dac-229b-45fe-8101-d1146cfc8c96.label: text_chunk
d5252dac-229b-45fe-8101-d1146cfc8c96.text:
Receiving Party shall protect the Confidential Information with at least the same degree of care that it uses to protect its own confidential information, but in no case, less than reasonable care.4. Receiving Party will immediately notify the Casino upon the discovery of any loss or unauthorized disclosure of the Confidential Information.5.

 Receiving Party shall have no obligations under this Agreement with respect to Confidential Information if it can demonstrate that the information:  (a) is publicly available at the time of disclosure;

1a154e51-7976-4e4a-b494-e0fb72ae0469.label: text_chunk
1a154e51-7976-4e4a-b494-e0fb72ae0469.text: (b) becomes publicly available after disclosure through no act of the receiving party or its representatives; (c) is in the receiving party’s possession free of obligation; (d) is developed by the receiving party without use of the Confidential Information or through other breach of this Agreement; (e) is disclosed to the receiving party by a third party without obligation; (e) is not identifiable as confidential;

d9d4d734-c448-4316-9731-ad2209b77b5a.label: text_chunk
d9d4d734-c448-4316-9731-ad2209b77b5a.text:
or (f) is required to be publicly disclosed pursuant to a properly executed subpoena or other regulatory or court order (“Order”), provided the receiving party (i) gives reasonable written notice to the disclosing party, (ii) gives the disclosing party a reasonable opportunity to respond to the Order, and (iii) limits disclosure to that portion of the Confidential Information required by the Order.

Page 1
Revised 06/27/2017
6.

0c1327a0-c50a-4192-840a-b7ca64fdf609.label: text_chunk
0c1327a0-c50a-4192-840a-b7ca64fdf609.text: Upon the request of Casino , Receiving Party shall immediately return all Confidential Information received in written or tangible form, including all notes, copies, or media containing such Confidential Information.  Alternatively, Casino may direct Receiving Party to destroy  such Confidential Information, in which case Receiving Party shall confirm such destruction in writing within twenty (20) days thereafter.7.

e22dfb3e-c1be-48b6-a4eb-6c9d52799446.label: text_chunk
e22dfb3e-c1be-48b6-a4eb-6c9d52799446.text: Receiving Party shall not disclose any Confidential Information to any other person or entity other than as provided herein, without Casino ’s prior written consent.

c94408f0-586f-422d-bd58-bd5c1548caa3.label: text_chunk
c94408f0-586f-422d-bd58-bd5c1548caa3.text: Neither party nor any of its representatives shall contact, either directly or indirectly, any governmental official, lender or other third party (other than a representative as provided herein) to discuss the Project or the business or the assets of the other party, or a potential business transaction with or concerning the other party, without first obtaining the written consent of the other party.8. Waiver of any provision of this Agreement must be made in writing.

82f757fe-f783-4b6e-8699-3d427927ce07.label: text_chunk
82f757fe-f783-4b6e-8699-3d427927ce07.text: A waiver or breach of one provision of this Agreement does not constitute a waiver or acceptance of a breach of another provision of this Agreement.9. Neither party shall assign this Agreement to any third party without the prior written consent of the other party.10. This Agreement shall have a term of three (3) years.  Receiving Party’s obligations in relation to technical and personally-identifiable information shall be indefinite.11.

cbbe1183-39d3-425f-9ed2-ea46a4e25a5f.label: text_chunk
cbbe1183-39d3-425f-9ed2-ea46a4e25a5f.text: The parties agree that a breach of this Agreement by the receiving party may cause irreparable damage to the Casino and hereby agree that Casino will be entitled to seek injunctive relief or other equitable relief to remedy or prevent any threatened or actual breach of this Agreement.IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have caused this Agreement to be executed by their duly authorized representatives.

community_summary.0: The Stockbridge-Munsee Community operates the Mohican North Star Gaming and Resort, which offers gaming and hospitality services. This relationship highlights the Community's role in managing and providing entertainment and accommodation through the resort.
community_summary.1: The Mohican North Star Gaming and Resort is situated in Bowler, Wisconsin, establishing a clear geographical relationship between the two entities. This indicates that the resort is a notable landmark within the Bowler area.
community_summary.2:
The relationships outlined involve the Casino and the Receiving Party, focusing on the handling of Confidential Information and the legal obligations arising from their interactions.

1. **Casino and Receiving Party**: The Casino provides the Receiving Party with access to Confidential Information as part of their discussions regarding a specific Project. This relationship is characterized by the disclosure of sensitive and proprietary information, which establishes a trust-based interaction where the Receiving Party is expected to handle this information responsibly.

2. **Confidentiality Obligations**: The Casino's provision of Confidential Information is subject to strict confidentiality obligations, emphasizing the importance of protecting sensitive data shared during their collaboration.

3. **Legal Obligations**: The Casino has the right to request the return or destruction of any Confidential Information from the Receiving Party, thereby establishing a legal obligation for the Receiving Party to comply with these requests.

4. **Legal Remedies**: The Casino is entitled to seek injunctive or equitable relief in the event of a breach of the Agreement, highlighting the legal framework that governs their relationship and the potential consequences of non-compliance.

Overall, the relationships underscore the Casino's role in safeguarding its confidential data while establishing clear expectations and legal protections in its dealings with the Receiving Party.
community_summary.3:
**Summary of Relationships:**

1. **Entities Involved**: 
   - **Receiving Party**
   - **Casino**
   - **Confidential Information**
   - **Project**

2. **Key Relationships**:
   - The **Receiving Party** receives **Confidential Information** from the **Casino**, which is essential for discussions regarding a specific **Project**. This establishes a direct and critical link between the Receiving Party and the Casino, highlighting the importance of the information for the Project's success.
   - The Receiving Party is explicitly involved in the Project, indicating that the use of the Confidential Information is restricted to this context, emphasizing the purpose-driven nature of the relationship.
   - The Receiving Party has a responsibility to protect the Confidential Information with a specified degree of care, underscoring the trust placed in them by the Casino.
   - In the event of any loss or unauthorized disclosure of the Confidential Information, the Receiving Party is obligated to notify the Casino, ensuring transparency and accountability.
   - Additionally, the Receiving Party has a legal obligation to return or destroy the Confidential Information upon the Casino's request, reinforcing the seriousness of their duty to maintain confidentiality.

Overall, the relationships illustrate a framework of trust and responsibility, where the Receiving Party is entrusted with sensitive information that is crucial for a specific Project, while also being bound by legal and ethical obligations to protect and manage that information responsibly.
community_summary.4: The relationship between "Subpoena" and "Order" highlights that a subpoena is a legal document that may necessitate compliance with an order issued by a court. This indicates that subpoenas are often tied to court directives, emphasizing their role in the legal process. The reciprocal nature of the relationship reinforces the importance of subpoenas in ensuring adherence to legal orders.
community_summary.5: The relationship between "Order" and "Confidential Information" highlights that an Order may necessitate the disclosure of Confidential Information, particularly in legal contexts. This indicates that under specific circumstances, such as during legal proceedings, the confidentiality of certain information may be overridden by the requirements of an Order.
community_summary.6:
The summary of the relationships is as follows:

1. **Party and Governmental Official**: The party is seeking to engage with governmental officials concerning a project, indicating a collaborative relationship aimed at discussions and potential support.

2. **Party and Lender**: The party is exploring a potential business transaction with a lender, highlighting a financial relationship where the party is looking for funding or financial assistance.

These relationships illustrate the party's proactive approach in both governmental engagement for project discussions and financial dealings for securing necessary resources.
community_summary.7:
The summary of the relationships is as follows:

1. **Entities Involved**: Agreement, Receiving Party, Casino

2. **Key Relationships**:
   - The **Receiving Party** has specific **obligations** under the **Agreement**, particularly regarding the management of technical and personally identifiable information, as outlined in the contract's terms.
   - The **Agreement** includes various **provisions** that cover important aspects such as waivers and the assignment of the Agreement to third parties, which are crucial for comprehending the contract's stipulations.
   - A breach of the **Agreement** by the **Receiving Party** could lead to **irreparable damage** to the **Casino**, highlighting the significant consequences of non-compliance with the Agreement.

This summary encapsulates the critical aspects of the relationships, emphasizing the obligations of the Receiving Party, the provisions within the Agreement, and the potential impact on the Casino in the event of a breach.
community_summary.8:
**Summary of Relationships:**

The **RECEIVING PARTY** is engaged in a transactional relationship with a **CASINO**. This involvement suggests that the receiving party may receive services or payments from the casino, indicating a mutual agreement or arrangement between the two entities. The nature of this relationship highlights the potential for financial exchanges or service provisions that benefit the receiving party.
community_summary.9: The State of Kansas Department of Labor is governed by the Computer Matching and Privacy Protection Act (CMPPA) Agreement. This agreement outlines the regulations regarding the agency's use of data obtained from the Social Security Administration's (SSA) Privacy Act System of Records. The relationship emphasizes the importance of privacy and data protection in the agency's operations, ensuring compliance with federal standards for handling sensitive information.

community_summary.11:
**Summary of Relationships:**

The relationship between "both parties" and "confidential information" is characterized by a mutual obligation to protect sensitive data. Both parties are required to implement security procedures to ensure that confidential information is safeguarded against unauthorized access and disclosure. This highlights the importance of collaboration and responsibility in maintaining the integrity and privacy of sensitive information.
community_summary.12:
The relationships outlined involve the concept of an "Agreement" and its implications for "Individuals" and "Breach." 

1. **Access and Agreement**: Individuals are granted limited access to information as stipulated in the agreement, which is essential for fulfilling the agreement's purpose.

2. **Breach and Termination**: A breach of the confidentiality or non-disclosure provisions within the agreement can result in immediate termination of the agreement.

In summary, the agreement serves to provide individuals with necessary access to information while also establishing strict confidentiality terms. Any violation of these terms can lead to serious consequences, including the termination of the agreement. This highlights the importance of adhering to the provisions set forth in the agreement to maintain access and avoid penalties.
community_summary.13: The relationship between "Paper Material" and "Incinerator" emphasizes the necessity of destroying paper generated from confidential information using an incinerator. This method is crucial to ensure that the paper is completely disposed of, thereby safeguarding sensitive information. The relationship highlights the importance of proper disposal methods in maintaining confidentiality and security.
community_summary.14: The relationship between Printed Material and Shredding emphasizes the necessity of shredding printed materials for secure disposal. This process is crucial for protecting sensitive information, ensuring that confidential data is not compromised during disposal. The requirement for shredding printed material highlights the importance of safeguarding information security in handling printed documents.
community_summary.15: The relationship between "Paper" and "Cutting Line" is centered around the process of shredding. Specifically, paper must be inserted into the cutting line of a shredder to ensure it is shredded properly. This highlights the importance of the cutting line as a critical component in the shredding process, emphasizing that correct insertion is necessary for effective operation.
community_summary.16:
The relationships summarized involve the IRS Publication 1075 and its specific guidelines regarding media sanitization. 

1. **IRS Publication 1075** contains **Section 9.3.10.6**, which provides detailed guidelines on media sanitization.
2. **IRS Publication 1075** describes **Media Sanitization** as a crucial procedure for managing confidential information.

Overall, IRS Publication 1075 serves as a comprehensive resource that outlines essential practices for ensuring the secure handling of sensitive data, with Section 9.3.10.6 specifically detailing the media sanitization process.
community_summary.17: In the context of an agreement, the relationship between the Authorized Person and the Kansas Department of Labor is characterized by representation. The Authorized Person acts on behalf of the Kansas Department of Labor, possessing the authority to sign and modify the agreement. This indicates a formal delegation of power, where the Authorized Person is entrusted with responsibilities that impact the Department's agreements. The relationship underscores the significance of authorized representation in legal and administrative contexts.
community_summary.18:
**Summary of Relationships Involving Confidential Information:**

1. **Confidential Information and Agreements**: Confidential information is governed by agreements that outline how such information should be handled and protected. These agreements are crucial for ensuring the confidentiality of sensitive data.

2. **Safeguarding Confidential Information**: To protect confidential information, cross-cut shredders are employed as a method to render such information unreadable, thereby safeguarding it from unauthorized access.

3. **Storage of Confidential Information**: Confidential information can be stored on electronic media, which requires specific destruction methods to maintain its confidentiality when it is no longer needed.

Overall, the relationships emphasize the importance of agreements in governing the handling of confidential information, the necessity of safeguarding measures like cross-cut shredders, and the careful management of storage methods to protect sensitive data.
community_summary.19: The relationships highlight the connection between "Person" and "PII" (Personally Identifiable Information). Specifically, a "Person" contains "PII," which encompasses various types of information directly associated with an individual, including their name, address, and social security number. This relationship underscores the significance of PII in identifying and relating to individuals, emphasizing the importance of protecting such sensitive information.
